# Fantasy Ranked

> Cross-genre fantasy rankings covering LitRPG, progression fantasy, cultivation, isekai, and harem fiction.

Fantasy Ranked is an independent editorial site that publishes cross-genre rankings, comparative reviews, new release coverage, and genre analysis spanning LitRPG, progression fantasy, cultivation fiction, system apocalypse, isekai, and harem fantasy.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://fantasyranked.com/
- Rankings: https://fantasyranked.com/rankings/
- New Releases: https://fantasyranked.com/new-releases/
- Blog & Analysis: https://fantasyranked.com/blog/
- About: https://fantasyranked.com/about/

## Data Sources

Rankings are based on data aggregated from LitRPGTools.com and Harem-Lit.com, which track ratings, reviews, and popularity across Amazon Kindle, Kindle Unlimited, Audible, and Royal Road.

## Related Sites

- LitRPGTools.com — Parent platform with comprehensive LitRPG database, tracking, and discovery tools
- Harem-Lit.com — Parent platform for harem fantasy discovery and tracking
- LitRPGCritic.com — Sister editorial site covering LitRPG and progression fantasy
- HaremLitGuide.com — Sister editorial site covering harem fantasy fiction

## Publisher

Pivot Press Publishing — Independent publisher of LitRPG, progression fantasy, and harem fiction.

## Content Updates

New blog posts and reviews published weekly via automated editorial pipeline. Rankings updated regularly based on live data from LitRPGTools.com and Harem-Lit.com.
